title: Hook returning all viewport context for diagnostics page
scenario_context: /debug page shows all detected viewport context: size, orientation, pointer, motion, etc.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: No way to debug user environment
responsive_reasoning: 1. Combine all hooks.\n2. Display verbatim.\n3. Help users report issues.
edge_cases_handled: User can copy for bug report

title: Side menu with nested groups that adapt indent per width
scenario_context: Per responsive-062 + nested groups.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Per responsive-062.

title: Big number display with proper kerning and alignment
scenario_context: Large stat number ($1,234,567). Proper kerning, tabular-nums for stability.
responsive_reasoning: 1. tabular-nums.\n2. Font-feature-settings for kern.\n3. fluid clamp size.

title: Component library: tokens consumed by all components consistently
scenario_context: Design tokens (spacing, type, color) consumed by all components. Single source.
responsive_reasoning: 1. CSS custom properties.\n2. Consumed everywhere.\n3. Single source.

title: Drag-to-scroll horizontal carousel with momentum (iOS-like)
scenario_context: Per responsive-155 + momentum like iOS.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Native scroll has momentum.\n2. Combined with snap.\n3. iOS-like UX.

layout_strategy.primary_technique: Native scroll + JS drag for mouse

title: Form with required field indicator clear on all devices
scenario_context: Required fields marked with asterisk + 'required' label. Visible on all viewports.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Asterisk + text 'required'.\n2. Visible always.\n3. aria-required on input.

title: App with tab bar + mini player above with stacking offsets
scenario_context: Spotify-like. Tab bar at bottom. Mini player above tab bar. Both respect safe area.
responsive_reasoning: 1. CSS variables stack.\n2. Per responsive-173.\n3. Universal.

title: Photo viewer in landscape with EXIF data shown below
scenario_context: Photo viewer. Landscape: image + EXIF panel right. Portrait: image + EXIF below collapsible.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Orientation drives.\n2. Per responsive-375.\n3. EXIF always accessible.

title: iPad Pencil writing area that adapts to fit hand placement
scenario_context: Apple Pencil drawing area. Palm rejection works at OS level. UI shouldn't interfere with writing zone.
responsive_reasoning: 1. UI in top + sides.\n2. Bottom clear for palm.\n3. Per iPad guidelines.

title: Comparison view (two panes side-by-side) with synchronized scroll
scenario_context: Two columns side-by-side. Scroll synced. Mobile: tabs to switch.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Sync scroll desktop.\n2. Tabs mobile.\n3. Same data.

title: Multi-column sort with priority indicator (1, 2, 3)
scenario_context: Sort by multiple columns. Shift+click to add. Indicator shows priority.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Sort state array.\n2. Indicator shows priority.\n3. Per responsive-161.

detection_strategy.code_pattern: if (shift) add to sort else replace

title: Locale-aware date input with month names in user's locale
scenario_context: Date input shows month names per locale (Jan/Janvier/January/Janeiro). Native pickers handle this.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Native type=date respects browser locale.\n2. Or Intl.DateTimeFormat.\n3. Universal.

title: Slideshow with adaptive captions per slide aspect
scenario_context: Slideshow with mixed aspect images. Captions overlay or below per aspect.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Wide slides: caption below.\n2. Tall slides: caption overlay.\n3. Per responsive-373.

title: Nav with notifications dropdown that auto-marks as read on open
scenario_context: Notifications bell. Click opens list. Items auto-mark as read.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Open → mark visible items.\n2. Adaptive dropdown/sheet.\n3. Per responsive-224.

title: Slide-up bottom sheet with snap points (peek, half, full)
scenario_context: Bottom sheet snaps at 3 heights (peek, half, full). Drag to switch.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Drag → calc target snap.\n2. Snap on release.\n3. Native iOS Maps pattern.

title: Browser extension popup: small fixed window with own constraints
scenario_context: Browser extension popup is 400px wide max. Design accordingly.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Assuming responsive only matters on big
responsive_reasoning: 1. Extension popup constrained.\n2. Design for tight width.\n3. Vertical scroll OK.

title: Hook for app shell that adapts based on viewport-driven app config
scenario_context: App config can vary per viewport (e.g., enable feature on desktop only). Centralized config.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Viewport-driven config object.\n2. Context.\n3. Centralized.

title: Self-contained widget that exports to embedded contexts (Substack, Medium)
scenario_context: Widget exported to embed on third-party platforms. Container queries make it work anywhere.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Container queries only.\n2. No viewport assumptions.\n3. Per responsive-438.

title: Whole design system summary: tokens + fluid scale + utility classes
scenario_context: Summary task: typography tokens + utility classes + Tailwind integration. The complete picture.
responsive_reasoning: 1. Tokens central.\n2. Utility classes consume.\n3. Tailwind extends theme.

title: Comprehensive responsive system audit checklist for design review
scenario_context: Final task: checklist that summarizes all critical responsive concerns. Use for design reviews.
responsive_reasoning:
1. Multi-viewport testing.
2. Input model coverage.
3. Accessibility throughout.
4. Performance at all sizes.
5. Edge case handling.
what_breaks_naive_approach: Skipping any check = production bug somewhere.
what_makes_this_truly_responsive: 1) Comprehensive coverage. 2) Multi-axis. 3) Cross-cutting concerns checklist. Final task summarizing the entire responsive design discipline.
